title: Rei Angel 3rd impact
wikitext:
[]: Rei + Angel = 3rd impact??             Quote Post by CCri » Tue Apr 23, 2013 2:45 am If Rei carries lilith's soul why doesn't the this create a third impact when the angel fuses with her? Same thing can be asked in the regular series.

[]:             Quote Post by Stan » Tue Apr 23, 2013 7:05 am This is the rebuilt forum, so Ill answer the rebuilt part of the question. SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by K40s » Tue Apr 23, 2013 11:50 am * In NGE Rei may not have had the whole soul of Lilith, only a piece, in NME hasn't been stated yet. * A Lilith body also may be required, by this I mean a giant marshmallow body possessing the Fruit of Knowledge. * If an Angel (including Adam) contacts Lilith then an Impact happens, this means that you need: 1) an Angelic body with the Fruit of Life and a complete soul 2) a Lilithian body with the Fruit of Knowledge and a complete soul Assuming those statements are indeed true then: 1) Just Rei being inside an Eva doesn't cause an Impact because, Rei not having the whole Soul of Lilith (NGE) and the Eva not having the FoL 2) Rei being absorbed by Armisael in NGE, we didn't really saw the end of that and it seemed more like the angel was using the Eva-00 to revive the fallen angels, either way Rei may not have had the full soul of Lilith at that moment (indicated by the voice welcoming her into Lilith in EoE), Eva-00 wasn't a clone of Lilith (or if it was it didn't had the FoK), it was a clone of Adam without the FoL. Most likely the whole reason why Rei self destructed there was because Armisael was also starting to fuse with Eva-01 which is implied to be a clone of Lilith and at that point probably has both fruits. 3) Rei being absorbed by Zeruel in NME 2.22, assuming that between Rei 2 and Eva-00 we have the whole soul of Lilith, it would indicate that Eva-00 isn't a clone of Lilith or, if it is, it lacks the FoK, either way we can fanwank that both fruits are present in that scenario, since when Eva-01 absorbs Eva-00's core is when the Impactty stuff happen, my guess is that Eva-01 is a clone of Lilith with the FoK (Yui and Shinji merged togheter serving as replacement for the soul of Lilith) and during that scene got the FoL from Zeruel's goo (that also included Eva-00's body) that condensated around Eva-00's core into Giant Red Rei, so basically GRR is a being composed of angelic matter with the FoL and with a whole soul (that of Lilith but in this case serving as replacement for the soul of the Angel/Adam, ironic, isn't it?), so basically a viable replacement of Lilith and a viable replacement of Adam fused together and ta-da! we got an Impact.
summary:
[]: Rei + Angel = 3rd impact??             Quote Post by CCri » Tue Apr 23, 2013 2:45 am If Rei carries lilith's soul why doesn't the this create a third impact when the angel fuses with her? Same thing can be asked in the regular series.

[]:             Quote Post by Stan » Tue Apr 23, 2013 7:05 am This is the rebuilt forum, so Ill answer the rebuilt part of the question. SPO
